title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage local LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from any Python script or notebook.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, embed, and list local models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs, chat, and embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-web)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs for chat, generate, pull, and embed.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit to chat over your documents locally.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot replacement with inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI (Terminal User Interface) for Ollama written in Rust; browse, chat, and manage models inside the terminal.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Tauri and React; chat, manage models, and export conversations.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server via slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service so you can run model tests or generate docs in your pipelines.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package and NixOS module for Ollama enabling declarative model downloads and systemd service.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async APIs for chat, generate, embed, and pull operations.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with support for chat, streaming, and embeddings; includes a Blazor sample app.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration that exposes Ollama as injectable services for chat, embeddings, and tool calling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for LLM pipelines.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot template that combines Ollama with LangChain retrievers for private document Q&A.

title: ollama-rust-sdk
summary: Community Rust SDK with async/await support, strong typing, and examples for axum and tauri apps.
